steps.title: Identify the initial moment
steps.content: From which the tennis ball was launched refers to time $t = 0$, the initial moment when the tennis ball leaves the balcony.

steps.title: Evaluate the equation at t = 0
steps.content:
Substitute $t = 0$ into $h = -4.9t^2 + 7t + 24$:
$$h = -4.9(0)^2 + 7(0) + 24 = 24$$The initial height is 24 meters.
